chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 371 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Haring of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1845/2020 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for the Respondent No.4 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< This is a date by Court matter, whereas, Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the latter is on general adjournment. Record reflects that General Adjournment was granted by this Court except date by Court cases and the instant Constitutional Petition is pending since 2020 without any progress. Under the circumstances, we have left no with other option but to dismiss the instant Constitutional Petition for non-prosecution along with listed application. Ordered accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
